title: Introduction to Python
description: Set up Python environment, learn about variables, data types, and basic syntax.

title: Control Structures
description: Understand conditional statements and loops (if, for, while).

title: Data Structures
description: Learn about lists, tuples, sets, and dictionaries.

title: Functions
description: Understand how to define and call functions, and learn about parameters and return values.

title: Modules and Packages
description: Learn how to import and use modules, and understand package management with pip.

title: File Handling
description: Learn how to read from and write to files in Python.

title: Error Handling
description: Understand exceptions and how to handle errors gracefully.

title: Introduction to Libraries
description: Get familiar with popular libraries like NumPy and Pandas.

title: Data Analysis with Pandas
description: Perform basic data analysis and manipulation using Pandas.

title: Web Scraping with Beautiful Soup
description: Learn the basics of web scraping and extracting data from websites.

title: Introduction to Frameworks
description: Get an overview of web frameworks like Flask or Django.

title: Start Your Project
description: Begin working on a simple project that utilizes what you've learned.

title: Complete Your Project
description: Finish your project, ensuring all features are working as intended.

title: Review and Reflection
description: Review what you've learned, seek feedback, and plan next steps for further learning.

title: HTML & CSS Basics
description: Learn the structure of HTML documents and how to style them using CSS. Complete exercises on creating a basic webpage.

title: JavaScript Fundamentals
description: Cover the basics of JavaScript including variables, data types, functions, and control structures. Practice coding simple scripts.

title: Build a Simple Web Project
description: Combine your knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to create a simple web application, such as a personal portfolio or a to-do list app.

title: Introduction to JavaScript
description: Learn about JavaScript history, its role in web development, and get familiar with variables, data types, and basic syntax.

title: Control Structures and Functions
description: Understand if statements, loops (for, while), and function creation and invocation.

title: DOM Manipulation
description: Learn how to select HTML elements, modify them, and handle events using JavaScript.

title: Asynchronous JavaScript
description: Understand callbacks, promises, and the fetch API to handle asynchronous operations.

title: Build Your First Project
description: Create a simple interactive web application that incorporates everything learned throughout the week.
